title: hydrangea serrata
intro: Hydrangea serrata, also known as mountain hydrangea or serrated hydrangea, is a type of flowering plant native to East Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of hydrangea serrata include relief from pain and swelling, improved digestive health, and support for the immune system. Hydrangea serrata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its herbal benefits, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
